phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: Junto al Patio de Armas, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH AHR-mahs AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the main entrance, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH AHR-mahs AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto al Patio de Armas, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main entrance is located
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la entrada principal?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah en-TRAH-dah prin-see-PAHL

likely_response.local: Por el Patio de Armas, puerta grande azul.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH AHR-mahs poo-EHR-tah GRAHN-deh ah-THOOL
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight to the large blue door.

responses.english: Go straight to the large blue door.
responses.phonetic: POHR EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH AHR-mahs poo-EHR-tah GRAHN-deh ah-THOOL
responses.french: Por el Patio de Armas, puerta grande azul.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the royal chapel is inside
phrases.text_local: Perdone, ¿dónde se encuentra la capilla real dentro?
phrases.pronunciation: pehr-DO-neh, DOHN-deh seh en-kwen-TRAH la kah-PEE-yah reh-AL den-TROH?

likely_response.local: En el patio interior, justo al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh een-teh-ree-OHR HOO-stoh AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: In the inner courtyard, straight at the back.

responses.english: In the inner courtyard, straight at the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh een-teh-ree-OHR HOO-stoh AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: En el patio interior, justo al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the next guided tour starts
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde comienza la próxima visita guiada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh koh-MEE-en-sah lah PROH-ksee-mah bee-BEE-tah gee-AH-dah?

likely_response.local: En el patio de armas, junto al guía.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH AHR-mahs HOON-toh AHL g-Í-ah
likely_response.translation_en: In the parade ground, next to the guide.

responses.english: In the parade ground, next to the guide.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH AHR-mahs HOON-toh AHL g-Í-ah
responses.french: En el patio de armas, junto al guía.
